nodes.name: 叽喳柳莺
nodes.summary: 叽喳柳莺（Common chiffchaff，学名 Phylloscopus collybita），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于路易·皮埃尔·维埃约、伦敦。
nodes.shortSummary: 叽咋柳莺（学名：Phylloscopus collybita），又名囂鴓鳥，为柳莺科柳莺属的鸟类。是一種常見且廣泛分佈的柳鶯，主要在北歐及溫帶歐洲和古北界的開闊林地中繁殖。 這是一種遷徙性雀形目鳥類，冬季棲息於歐洲南部和西部、亞洲南部以及北非。其上半身呈綠褐色，下半身為灰白色，…

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Phylloscopus
nodes.summary: Phylloscopus（Phylloscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联80种鸟类，如Western Bonelli's warbler、Eastern Bonelli's warbler、橙斑翅柳莺等80种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Phylloscopus collybita |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T103843725A264567918 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T103843725A264567918.en |access-date=19 February 2026}} | image = Common Chiffchaff 2025 04 04 01.jpg | image_upright = 1.1 | image_caption = In France | image2 = Chiffchaff (Phylloscopus collybita) (W1CDR0001497 BD9).ogg | image2_caption = Typical song, recorded in the United Kingdom in 1977 | genus = Phylloscopus | species = collybita | authority = (Vieillot, 1817) | range_map = Phylloscopus collybita.png | range_map_upright = 1.1 | range_map_caption = }} The common chiffchaff (Phylloscopus collybita), or simply the chiffchaff, is a common and widespread leaf warbler which breeds in open woodlands throughout northern and temperate Europe and the Palearctic

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is often found near water, unlike the willow warbler which tolerates drier habitats. There is an increasing tendency to winter in western Europe well north of the traditional areas, especially in coastal southern England and the mild urban microclimate of London. These overwintering common chiffchaffs include some visitors of the eastern subspecies abietinus and tristis, so they are certainly not all birds which have bred locally, although some undoubtedly are
